description: BulkFormer diagnostics toolkit rollout using fresh-context Ralph iterations.
notes: The vendor-ralph setup story is intended to land before or alongside the broader rollout. The remaining stories map to the planned implementation sequence.

userStories.title: Vendor Ralph assets and document the rollout workflow
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a repo-local Ralph workflow so future implementation can run with fresh context and documented branch discipline.
acceptanceCriteria: Vendor Ralph runner and prompts under scripts/ralph
Add repo-specific PRD and progress templates
Document the branch and commit workflow in repo docs
userStories.notes: This is the setup pass for the rest of the rollout.

userStories.title: Scaffold the bulkformer_dx package and CLI entrypoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the diagnostics package structure in place so downstream features land into stable modules and tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Create bulkformer_dx package with __init__.py and cli.py
Add command-group placeholders for preprocess, anomaly, tissue, and proteomics
Create initial tests and docs placeholders
userStories.notes: Commit boundary 1 of the planned rollout.

userStories.title: Add macOS and Linux environment specs
userStories.description: As a user, I want portable environment files and installation guidance for MPS and CUDA so setup is reproducible.
acceptanceCriteria: Add envs/bulkformer_macos_mps.yaml and envs/bulkformer_linux_cuda.yaml
Keep bulkformer.yaml unchanged
Document exact PyTorch 2.5.1 and PyG install guidance plus MPS verification notes

userStories.title: Implement preprocessing with TPM alignment and reports
userStories.description: As a user, I want raw counts converted into BulkFormer-aligned inputs with explicit masking semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: Load raw counts and Gencode-backed gene length annotations
Compute TPM then log1p(TPM) and align to the BulkFormer vocabulary with -10 fill
Export valid-gene masks and preprocessing reports with unit tests for math and alignment

userStories.title: Implement BulkFormer asset discovery and model loading
userStories.description: As a user, I want to load local or downloaded BulkFormer assets reliably across supported model variants.
acceptanceCriteria: Discover required graph and feature assets with clear missing-file errors
Support variant-aware config selection including the local 37M checkpoint
Add checkpoint cleanup, graph construction, embedding extraction, and a smoke test path

userStories.title: Add ranking-only anomaly scoring
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want cohort-level anomaly scores and ranked genes using BulkFormer masking semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: Use Monte Carlo masking only across valid genes with default mask_prob=0.15
Preserve BulkFormer -10 masking semantics
Emit cohort score tables, per-sample ranked gene files, and QC summaries with tests

userStories.title: Implement the anomaly uncertainty head
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want a frozen-backbone anomaly head with a documented default path for uncertainty-aware scoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement the sigma/NLL head as the default supported mode
Keep injected-outlier training as an explicitly synthetic optional mode
Document the frozen-backbone assumption

userStories.title: Add empirical cohort calibration
userStories.description: As a user, I want calibrated anomaly outputs with a clearly documented approximation path where needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement empirical residual calibration first
Use BY per-sample correction by default
Clearly label any negative-binomial count-space path as an approximation

userStories.title: Implement tissue train and predict flows
userStories.description: As a user, I want tissue validation workflows driven by BulkFormer embeddings and serialized sklearn artifacts.
acceptanceCriteria: Support train and predict CLI flows
Use BulkFormer embeddings with optional PCA and RandomForestClassifier
Persist the sklearn artifacts needed for inference

userStories.title: Implement proteomics training and inference
userStories.description: As a user, I want frozen transcriptome embeddings to drive protein prediction workflows with masked loss and residual ranking.
acceptanceCriteria: Support linear and MLP heads on frozen transcriptome embeddings
Handle missing protein targets with masked losses
Add residual ranking outputs and optional calibration files

userStories.title: Finalize docs and examples
userStories.description: As a user, I want runnable examples and clear reference docs for the new toolkit.
acceptanceCriteria: Add docs and examples covering CLI usage and expected input schemas
Document Ensembl ID/version handling and GPU versus MPS notes
Add lightweight repo-local config templates

userStories.title: Benchmark harness for anomaly methods
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want a unified benchmark harness to compare anomaly scoring methods with standardized metrics and outputs.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmark run and benchmark grid-run CLI commands
Synthetic dataset and outlier injection for evaluation
AUROC, AUPRC, recall@FDR, KS calibration metrics
benchmark_results.parquet and benchmark_summary.json outputs

userStories.title: Anomaly docs and reports README
userStories.description: As a user, I want documentation for scoring methods, cohort modes, and report naming.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs/bulkformer-dx/anomaly.md with residual, NLL, NB OUTRIDER, cohort-mode
bulkformer_dx/reports/README.md documents all steps and expected artifacts

userStories.title: Demo pipeline with spike inject and benchmark
userStories.description: Run demo preprocess, spike inject, anomaly score, calibrate; produce demo report with benchmarking.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/demo_spike_inject.py creates runs/demo_spike_37M/
scripts/spike_recovery_metrics.py produces spike_recovery.tsv and anomaly_qc_summary.json
scripts/run_demo_37M.sh runs end-to-end
reports/bulkformer_dx_demo_report.md includes AUROC, AUPRC, recall@FDR

userStories.title: Clinical 37M pipeline
userStories.description: Run clinical preprocess, anomaly score, calibrate (37M); produce clinical report.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/run_clinical_37M.sh runs end-to-end
reports/bulkformer_dx_clinical_report.md generated

userStories.title: Clinical 147M pipeline
userStories.description: Run anomaly score, calibrate, embeddings (147M); produce 147M report.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/run_clinical_147M.sh runs end-to-end
reports/bulkformer_dx_clinical_report_147M.md generated

userStories.title: Notebooks reproduce pipeline
userStories.description: Notebooks run without errors and reproduce reports.
acceptanceCriteria: notebooks/bulkformer_dx_demo_37M.ipynb executes top-to-bottom
notebooks/bulkformer_dx_clinical_37M_147M.ipynb executes top-to-bottom
